The Celebrations

Three Days of Joy & Blessings

Join us across three beautiful days of sacred ceremonies, music, and togetherness.

26
April · Sunday
Day I
🪔

Sunday · 26 April 2026

Kshetrapaal Pujan

10:00 AM

Sacred worship of the guardian deity of the land, performed at the family residence to seek divine protection and blessings for the upcoming celebrations.

27
April · Monday
Day II
🪷

Monday · 27 April 2026

Ganpati Sthapna & Mandap

9:00 AM · Narsingh Vatika

Installation of Lord Ganesha and consecration of the sacred wedding mandap. Prayers for an auspicious and obstacle-free ceremony.

🌿

Monday · 27 April 2026

Mamera

2:00 PM

A cherished pre-wedding ritual. Family arrives from Sukhdev Vihar, Indore with blessings and gifts for the bride.

💍

Monday · 27 April 2026

Sagai Samaroh

11:30 PM · All Family

The formal engagement ceremony — rings, blessings from elders, and the joyful coming together of both families. निमंत्रण सपरिवार।

🎵

Monday · 27 April 2026

Mahila Sangeet

7:30 PM Onwards

An enchanting evening of music, dance and celebration. Songs and laughter that will echo in memories forever.

28
April · Tuesday
Wedding Day 🌺
🔱

Tuesday · 28 April 2026

Baraat Procession

Morning · From Pahadiya

The groom's joyous procession arrives in Indore, led by the Jain family from Pahadiya, with music and celebration.

🌺

✨ Main Event

Shubh Lagna

11:00 AM · Narsingh Vatika

The sacred union of Pakhi & Sahil. The holy fire witnesses their vows as two families are bound together forever with divine blessings.

🍽

Tuesday · 28 April 2026

Aashirvaad & Sneh Bhoj

7:00 PM Onwards

An evening of blessings, warmth and a grand celebratory dinner — the perfect close to three magical days.
